name: Hierarchical Annotation v2 (115-row pilot, tree schema)
short_description: Tree-shaped (global / subtasks-with-atomics / global_atomics) hierarchical annotation of 115 benchmark tasks from FrontierScience-Olympiad, SWE-bench Verified, WorkArena++, and tau-bench. Re-annotates the v1 pilot under a v2 schema with explicit subtask-to-atomic edges and full problem text. Includes a 23-row LLM-as-judge spot-check.
size_description: 115 rows total; each row carries a tree-shaped hierarchy (global / subtasks-with-atomics / global_atomics) and a parallel gold_actions tree. 115 rows passed the v2 hierarchy_completeness check. 23 rows received an LLM-as-judge verdict (21 acceptable, 2 needs revision).

files.description: 115-row JSONL with the v2 tree schema and judge verdicts merged into the sampled rows.
